description: darwin-modules/apps/aerospace/config.nix (lines 28-83) has complex nested string generation with multiple layers of optionalString and concatSep for window rules. Also, darwin-modules/apps/settings/aerospace.nix has duplicated app IDs (com.apple.finder appears twice, com.google.Chrome appears twice). Extract a clean window rule formatter function and deduplicate app ID references.

comments.text: Won't fix: repeated app IDs are intentional (specific match before general). The TOML generator is already clean.

title: Simplify aerospace window-rule generation
